subject: [PATCH v2 4/4] btrfs: zoned: don't clobber the extent buffer when zeroing it out

reviews.author: Boris Burkov
reviews.summary: Raised an inline question about whether to hang the zero_page off eb->folios[], potentially simplifying the code but also introducing uncertainty.

reviews.author: Johannes Thumshirn
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the question and expressed willingness to consider the alternative approach, but did not commit to it.

2026-07-23.patch_summary: The patch modifies the btrfs zoned extent buffer handling to prevent clobbering when zeroing it out.
